subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Javád! The Most Exalted Pen maketh mention of thee from within the prison on a day wherein the servants have fasted for His Face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل جواد ان قلمی الاعلی یذکرک فی السجن فی یوم فیه صام العباد لوجه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @justice and wrath of God, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
